---
title: "Week 1 — Foundations"
subtitle: "May 18 – 22, 2026"
---

This week we get everyone set up with R, RStudio, and Quarto, and cover the absolute basics of the R language. By Friday you'll have written your first reproducible document and learned the pipe.

## Daily plan

| Date | Topic | Files |
|---|---|---|
| Mon May 18 | Course intro & what is R? | [View Slides](day1-intro-slides.html) · [View Page](day1-intro-page.html) · [View PDF](day1-intro.pdf) |
| Tue May 19 | R, RStudio, console · vectors · data types | [View Slides](day2-r-basics-slides.html) · [View Page](day2-r-basics-page.html) · [View PDF](day2-r-basics.pdf) |
| Wed May 20 | Functions, packages · tidyverse | [View Slides](day3-functions-packages-slides.html) · [View Page](day3-functions-packages-page.html) · [View PDF](day3-functions-packages.pdf) |
| Thu May 21 | Quarto basics | [View Slides](day4-quarto-slides.html) · [View Page](day4-quarto-page.html) · [View PDF](day4-quarto.pdf) |
| Fri May 22 | **Quiz 1** · pipe and chaining syntax | [View Slides](day5-quiz-pipe-slides.html) · [View Page](day5-quiz-pipe-page.html) · [View PDF](day5-quiz-pipe.pdf) |

## Due this week

**Readings (due at 9:35 a.m. on Perusall)**

- *(Optional)* **Monday:** *Data Computing* Ch 1 (§1.1–1.5) — what tidy data is
- **Tuesday:** *Data Computing* Ch 2 (§2.1–2.8) — R, RStudio, vectors, objects
- **Wednesday:** *Data Computing* Ch 3 (§3.1–3.5) — basic R commands
- **Thursday:** *Data Computing* Ch 4 (§4.1–4.7) — files and Quarto/Rmd documents
- **Friday:** *Data Computing* §3.6 — chaining syntax (the pipe)

**Assignments (Canvas & In-class)**

- **Wednesday May 20:** HW 0 (setup confirmation) — due 11:59 p.m. on Canvas
- **Friday May 22:** HW 1 — due 11:59 p.m. on Canvas
- **Friday May 22:** **Quiz 1** — in class

## Heads up for next week

- *Data Computing* Ch 5 (§5.1–5.6) for Tuesday May 26 — graphics intro.
- **No class Monday May 25** (Memorial Day).
